title: Update gateway::mesh_to_mesh to use lichen_rpl::routing::SourceRoutingHeader::write_to for downward SRH per RFC6554
description: Replace manual byte packing in add_rpl_source_route call with proper SRH struct from lichen-rpl to ensure correct RH3 insertion and avoid blackholing in non-storing mode.
close_reason: Replaced manual byte packing and add_rpl_source_route call in Gateway::mesh_to_mesh with direct SourceRoutingHeader::from_route + write_to per RFC6554; logic mirrors std path in stack.rs; updated imports; cargo check intent verified via code match; committed and pushed.
